title: Run a recall/precision benchmark on an index
description: Steps to score an index against a labeled query set and compare ANN recall to exact-search ground truth.
body: Use when validating an index change before serving. Do not approve a change on a few spot queries — regressions hide in the tail. Actions: run each labeled query through the index, compute recall@k and precision@k, run brute-force exact search to establish the true-neighbor ceiling, and report ANN recall against that ceiling. Validation signals include a recall/precision table with an exact-search baseline and a before/after comparison across the change. Risk boundary: shipping an index whose recall fell silently loses relevant results; if ANN recall trails the exact ceiling past tolerance, deny the change and escalate to retune the index.
